description_long: This upright piano features a dark wooden body with a rectangular form and white trim outlining its panels. The keyboard is fully exposed, displaying a standard arrangement of white and black keys, and a sheet of music is held in place above the keys. Several brown glass bottles are placed on top of the piano, and a few are also positioned at the base, suggesting a decorative or thematic element. The piano has two ornate, light-colored front legs and a solid back panel. The overall appearance is rustic and slightly worn, with a matte finish and visible wood grain.
description: A dark wooden upright piano with white trim, exposed keys, and brown bottles arranged on top and at the base. The piano has a rustic, slightly worn look with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, music sheet, and bottles on top and at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the piano and the arrangement of bottles on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back panel and the bottles on top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard's side profile and the bottles on top.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard layout with alternating white and black keys, approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
